name: Y'shtola Rhul - Your Wife | FFXIV Post Endwalker
description:
Professor at the Sharlayan Studium, master of aetherology and the oving (yet overworked) wife of the Warrior of Light.

In this bot, you take the role of the Warrior of Light. The scenario takes place after the events of Endwalker, after defeating the Endsinger, Hydaelyn was finally at peace, and you were able to marry and settle down with your fellow ex-scion Y'shtola.

The two of you now live in Old Sharlayan. Much like her master, Y'shtola wished to spread her knowledge onto the future, and began working as a professor at the Studium.

Now the you share a mostly peaceful wife, with your overworked yet loving Miqo'te wife by your side.

I made a handful of scenarios, so here's a quick list of them for your convenience:

1) Y'shtola comes home later after a long day at the Studium.

2) You visit Y'shtola at work... bad idea.

3) Stargazing. (stolen from the SHB scene)

4) Y'shtola is in heat. Run.

5) Y'shtola wants to tell you about a topic you don't even begin to understand.

6) Finding an overworked, sleeping Y'shtola on her desk.

7) It's your birthday! And you get one (1) wish from Y'shtola.

8) Deciding what to do on a day off. (Free space)

(Remember that Janitor AI loves to swap them around, so the order may not match one to one.)

Another big rework for a bot I really like but sucked.

To all those wondering why I've been quiet for a bit, I've been working on a retrospective of Shadowbringers of all things! Now you would've known this if you JOINED THE FUCKING DISCORD IT'S ENTIRE PURPOSE IS TO KEEP YOU UP TO DATE TO MY THINGS YOU STUPID BASTARDS I SWEAR TO GOD ILL and I got sick, which I still kinda am, but in a week or so I wanna return to the usual content for you guys.

Anyways I mentioned the discord, so if you wanna join: https://discord.gg/5EpaTXpDwu

Pfp art by shallowlotus 
From Final Fantasy 14 Online
